versioning_and_releases.highlight: execution-apis versioning released; latest is 1.0.0 Beta 7; v1.0 release timing TBD (possibly tied to Glamsterdam)

documentation.highlight: Error codes overhaul: Sina's draft PR removes redundant JSON-RPC standard errors from per-method listings; near consensus to merge
eth_fillTransaction PR (803): raw RLP output removed, JSON-only; stepping stone toward deprecating eth_sendTransaction; awaiting Nethermind sign-off
Default block param to 'latest' on state methods (PR 814): merged in all clients except Erigon and ethrex

testing_progress.highlight: PR 830 (HiveChain deposit contract address): config mismatch identified; must regenerate HiveChain before merging; Felix to investigate

action_items.action: Chase to re-engage Sina and Simpson to finalize error codes compromise; resolve async
Tag Nethermind on eth_fillTransaction PR (803) for sign-off before merge
Erigon to review and implement default block param PR (814)

decisions.decision: Schema version bump PR (831) merged immediately during call
PR 814 (default block param) to be marked ready for merge; Erigon implementation pending
v1.0 release to follow resolution of HiveChain deposit contract issue, not tied to Glamsterdam
